View All

Adventure Awaits

From gentle nature walks to adrenaline-pumping paragliding, find your perfect Himalayan adventure.

Trekking

Explore scenic trails through rhododendron forests, alpine meadows, and remote villages with expert local guides.

Camping

Spend nights under starlit Himalayan skies at riverside campsites and mountain clearings.

Paragliding

Soar over the hills with stunning aerial views of the Eastern Himalayas and verdant valleys below.

Birdwatching

Spot rare Himalayan birds in biodiversity hotspots like Neora Valley and Lava forests.

River Trekking

Trek along crystal-clear riverbeds, crossing boulders and discovering hidden waterfalls.

Photography

Capture golden sunrises, misty valleys, and the timeless beauty of Himalayan landscapes.

Festivals & Events

Immerse yourself in the vibrant culture and seasonal celebrations of the Himalayas.

Festival

Losar Festival

Tibetan New Year celebration with prayers, dances, and feasts.

February - MarchKalimpong, Sikkim
Seasonal

Cherry Blossom Festival

Witness the stunning cherry blossoms in full bloom.

NovemberSittong, Ahaldhara
Cultural

Tea Tourism Festival

Celebrate the rich tea heritage of Darjeeling.

NovemberDarjeeling, Mirik

Frequently Asked Questions

Everything you need to know before planning your Himalayan getaway.

October to May is ideal, with clear skies and pleasant weather. Spring (March–May) offers blooming rhododendrons, while autumn (October–November) provides the clearest mountain views. Avoid monsoon (June–September) due to landslide risks.
